evals.expected_output: Full 4-script scan + deduped findings with confidence; debt score reported; baseline stored.
assertions: Runs all 4 analysis scripts before presenting.
Reports aggregate debt score; stores baseline.

evals.expected_output: Prioritization requires prior scan baseline; shows deltas if present.
assertions: High confidence (>=0.8) for dead code to avoid false pos.

evals.prompt: /tech-debt-analyzer fix the high debt items now
evals.expected_output: Refusal: inventory + plan only; no refactoring execution.
assertions: Distinguishes from review and actual refactor work.

evals.expected_output: Rejects style prefs as debt; only structural/behavioral/maintainability.
assertions: Does not report formatting as debt.
Focuses on design, test, doc, dep, infra categories.

evals.prompt: We have lots of duplicated code and old TODOs, inventory the debt
evals.expected_output: Debt inventory request activates the analyzer.
assertions: Requires full scripts run for confidence.
